speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Have you finished yet?
questions: Have you finished your homework yet?
Has anything just happened in your life?
speaking.sampleAnswer: Yes, I have already finished my homework. Yes, I have already eaten lunch. I have just received some good news today.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: How long...?
questions: How long have you lived in your city?
How long have you studied English?
Since when have you known your best friend?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I have lived in my city for fifteen years. I have studied English for six years. I have known my best friend since I was a child.
